purpose: Isolate graph visual treatments so atlas, work-mode, and image-backed experiments can evolve independently.

representations.description: Default clustered work/product graph. Selected by ?rep=work-graph and used when rep is absent.
Reference-style macro atlas with packed canvas overlay, black moats, and varied node ranks.
Dense 2.5D cloud reference mode with perspective projection, shaded particles, and bridge tissue.
Headshot/photo-wall representation using the /headshots atlas and bloom controls.
People-image network representation using the 2-hop binary network and /network image atlas.

guardrails: Do not put experiment-only behavior in the core graph runtime.
Register new representations only through registry.ts.
Keep each representation teardown complete so styles, overlays, and event handlers do not leak.
Preserve asset-backed image representations separately from atlas-reference and native work mode.
